title: PMRCE - RESOURCE PACK
description: The mods resource pack will be about protomanlys weather mod witch then will make it cool clouds and rain fogs different
body:
## **What will this Resource Pack have and what will it do??**

What this Resource pack will do is that it will make extra clouds in the game and just by making the game more efficent and look better for example having rain fog as a different colour which make it more specific to real life which it would look cool like this![FINALLY WORKS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/102f4ea689c8eeac70c06c1651c141b5ed7e5f73.png)
IT FINALLY WORKS!!
